title: rumex crispus subsp. japonicus
intro: Rumex crispus subsp. japonicus, also known as Japanese curly dock or curly dock, is a plant species that belongs to the Polygonaceae family and is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support liver function, reduce oxidative stress, and potentially lower blood sugar levels. Rumex crispus subsp. japonicus can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
